---
title: "Corvus Star Phase 6 Implementation Backlog"
date: 2026-03-10
status: completed
---

# Corvus Star Phase 6 Implementation Backlog

> [!IMPORTANT]
> This backlog operationalizes Phase 6 from `docs/architecture/WOVEN_SKILL_CONSOLIDATION_BLUEPRINT.qmd`.
> Phase 6 promotes skill learning safely.
> Outcome observations must remain separate from canonical contracts, contract evolutions must become explicit proposals, and promotion must remain validation-gated.

## Phase 6 Mission

Phase 6 exists to make skill learning an explicit, reviewable, validation-backed workflow instead of a side effect scattered across proposal files, observations, and legacy promotion helpers.

The required outcomes are:

1. Skill outcome observations remain separate from canonical skill contracts.
2. Proposed skill contract evolutions are stored as structured Hall-backed records.
3. `evolve` emits canonical proposal records rather than only loose JSON artifacts.
4. Promotion requires accepted validation evidence before mutating the canonical skill contract surface.
5. Silent or implicit skill-promotion paths are quarantined or reduced to compatibility-only status.

## Phase 6 Exit Criteria

- A canonical Hall-backed schema exists for skill contract proposals and promotions.
- `evolve` records proposal metadata separately from skill observations.
- Accepted validation evidence gates contract promotion.
- The runtime can execute proposal generation and proposal promotion without bypassing Hall authority.
- No active skill-learning path silently promotes a contract without explicit validation-backed review.

## Execution Status

Current Phase 6 state:

- Phase 1 completed on 2026-03-09
- Phase 2 completed on 2026-03-09
- Phase 3 completed on 2026-03-09
- Phase 4 completed on 2026-03-09
- Phase 5 completed on 2026-03-09
- `CS-P6-00` closed on 2026-03-10
- `CS-P6-01` closed on 2026-03-10
- `CS-P6-02` closed on 2026-03-10
- `CS-P6-03` closed on 2026-03-10
- `CS-P6-04` closed on 2026-03-10
- Hall now stores skill observations separately from skill proposal records and promotion state
- `evolve` now emits canonical proposal ids plus validation-linked Hall proposal records
- Promotion now requires accepted validation and accepted SPRT before mutating canonical skill contracts
- Silent promotion helpers were either quarantined or reduced to explicit compatibility-only feedback logging
- Phase 6 completed on 2026-03-10

## Ticket Index

| ID | Status | Priority | Ticket | Depends On | Primary Surfaces |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `CS-P6-00` | Closed | P0 | Freeze The Skill-Learning Contract | Phase 5 complete | `hall_schema.py`, `types/hall.ts`, `intel/database.ts`, `evolve` contract surfaces |
| `CS-P6-01` | Closed | P0 | Add A Canonical Skill Proposal Registry | `CS-P6-00` | Hall proposal schema, proposal helpers, Hall tests |
| `CS-P6-02` | Closed | P1 | Make `evolve` Emit Hall-Backed Proposal Records | `CS-P6-01` | `evolve_skill.py`, runtime metadata, evolve tests |
| `CS-P6-03` | Closed | P1 | Gate Skill Promotion On Accepted Validation | `CS-P6-01`, `CS-P6-02` | evolve promote path, runtime weave, validation/promotion tests |
| `CS-P6-04` | Closed | P1 | Quarantine Silent Skill Promotion Paths | `CS-P6-03` | legacy promotion helpers, unsafe promotion tests, closure docs |

## Critical Path

The critical path is:

`CS-P6-00 -> CS-P6-01 -> CS-P6-02 -> CS-P6-03 -> CS-P6-04`

## Ticket Details

## `CS-P6-00` Freeze The Skill-Learning Contract

### Objective

Define the canonical schema and contract surface for skill observations, proposals, and promotions before mutating the runtime again.

### Files

- `src/core/engine/hall_schema.py`
- `src/types/hall.ts`
- `src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.ts`
- `.agents/skills/evolve/contract.json`
- Hall schema tests

### Change Set

- Declare one Hall-backed record shape for skill contract proposals.
- Align the Python and TypeScript Hall mirrors.
- Freeze the `evolve` contract so proposal and promotion outputs are explicit.

### Acceptance Criteria

- Python and TypeScript agree on the Phase 6 skill-learning record shapes.
- `evolve` has an explicit proposal/promotion contract surface rather than an implied JSON blob.

### Verification

```powershell
npx tsx --test tests/unit/test_hall_schema.test.ts
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_hall_schema.py -q
npx tsc --noEmit
```

### Closure Note

Closed on 2026-03-10.

Implemented outcomes:

- Python and TypeScript Hall mirrors now define one canonical skill proposal record shape plus proposal status enum.
- PennyOne's DB mirror now persists the same proposal surface instead of forcing proposal state into observations.
- The `evolve` contract now declares explicit `propose` and `promote` actions, proposal ids, and promotion-gate requirements.

## `CS-P6-01` Add A Canonical Skill Proposal Registry

### Objective

Store skill contract evolution proposals as structured Hall-backed records instead of only loose files under `.agents/proposals/`.

### Files

- `src/core/engine/hall_schema.py`
- `src/tools/pennyone/intel/database.ts`
- proposal helper module(s)
- Hall schema tests

### Change Set

- Add canonical skill proposal persistence.
- Add helpers to write and read proposal records plus proposal artifacts.
- Preserve proposal files as materialized artifacts, not the sole source of truth.

### Acceptance Criteria

- Skill proposals can be listed and loaded from Hall-backed state.
- Proposal artifacts remain downstream from canonical records.

### Verification

```powershell
npx tsx --test tests/unit/test_hall_schema.test.ts
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_hall_schema.py -q
```

### Closure Note

Closed on 2026-03-10.

Implemented outcomes:

- Hall now persists skill proposal records separately from skill observations.
- The new `skill_learning.py` helper materializes proposal artifacts under `.agents/proposals/evolve/` while treating Hall as the authority.
- Proposal records can be loaded, listed, and linked back to their bead, validation, and canonical contract path.

## `CS-P6-02` Make `evolve` Emit Hall-Backed Proposal Records

### Objective

Ensure `evolve` writes canonical proposal records, links them to validation evidence, and keeps observations separate from proposals.

### Files

- `src/core/engine/evolve_skill.py`
- `.agents/skills/evolve/scripts/evolve.py`
- runtime evolve surfaces
- evolve tests

### Change Set

- Record a structured proposal alongside the materialized proposal artifact.
- Return proposal identifiers and statuses through the runtime.
- Keep Hall observations limited to outcome reporting rather than contract authority.

### Acceptance Criteria

- `evolve` emits a canonical proposal id and status.
- Proposal records point to the linked validation evidence and bead.

### Verification

```powershell
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py tests/unit/test_hall_schema.py tests/unit/test_validation_result.py -q
npx tsx --test tests/unit/test_evolve_runtime.test.ts tests/unit/test_hall_schema.test.ts
npx tsc --noEmit
```

### Closure Note

Closed on 2026-03-10.

Implemented outcomes:

- `execute_evolve()` now writes a validation result, loads the persisted Hall validation run, and emits a canonical Hall proposal record.
- Runtime and CLI surfaces now return proposal ids, proposal status, and contract metadata instead of only a loose proposal artifact path.
- Hall observations remain outcome-only and no longer act as the proposal authority surface.

## `CS-P6-03` Gate Skill Promotion On Accepted Validation

### Objective

Add an explicit promotion path that mutates canonical skill contracts only after accepted validation evidence is present.

### Files

- evolve promotion helpers
- `.agents/skills/evolve/scripts/evolve.py`
- `src/node/core/commands/dispatcher.ts`
- `src/node/core/runtime/weaves/evolve.ts`
- promotion tests

### Change Set

- Add an explicit promote action for skill proposals.
- Require accepted validation evidence before promotion.
- Mark the proposal and bead lifecycle honestly after promotion.

### Acceptance Criteria

- Promotion fails without accepted validation evidence.
- Successful promotion updates the canonical skill contract and finalizes the linked bead lifecycle.

### Verification

```powershell
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py tests/unit/test_validation_result.py -q
npx tsx --test tests/unit/test_evolve_runtime.test.ts
npx tsc --noEmit
```

### Closure Note

Closed on 2026-03-10.

Implemented outcomes:

- `evolve` now exposes an explicit promote action that loads the Hall proposal record rather than inferring promotion from proposal generation.
- Promotion is blocked unless the linked validation verdict and SPRT verdict are both `ACCEPTED`.
- Successful promotion mutates the canonical contract, records a promotion observation, marks the proposal `PROMOTED`, and resolves the linked bead.

## `CS-P6-04` Quarantine Silent Skill Promotion Paths

### Objective

Retire or quarantine remaining code paths that silently promote skills or contracts outside the canonical proposal flow.

### Files

- unsafe legacy promotion helpers
- legacy/unsafe promotion tests
- Phase 6 closure docs

### Change Set

- Quarantine or demote any helper that auto-promotes skills without explicit Hall-backed review.
- Leave only explicit compatibility surfaces where removal is not yet safe.
- Document the final Phase 6 skill-learning authority model.

### Acceptance Criteria

- No active skill-learning path silently promotes a contract.
- Remaining compatibility promotion helpers are explicit and clearly non-canonical.

### Verification

```powershell
.\.venv\Scripts\python.exe -m pytest tests/unit/test_memory_skill_compat.py tests/unit/test_evolve_skill.py tests/unit/test_hall_schema.py tests/unit/test_validation_result.py -q
npx tsx --test tests/unit/test_evolve_runtime.test.ts tests/unit/test_hall_schema.test.ts
npx tsc --noEmit
```

### Closure Note

Closed on 2026-03-10.

Implemented outcomes:

- The old sandbox warden auto-promotion path was quarantined under `.corvus_quarantine/`.
- The legacy `memory` skill no longer mutates `.feature` contracts directly; it now records Hall-backed feedback and explicitly directs operators to the bead-backed evolve proposal flow.
- Remaining compatibility helpers may still report status, but no active Phase 6 skill-learning path silently mutates canonical contracts outside the Hall-backed proposal and validation flow.
